description: 一个目标受众群体或粉丝画像，通过人口统计特征、兴趣爱好和平台活跃度来刻画

name.description: 受众群体的名称或标签，例如：Z世代美妆爱好者、科技从业者

demographics.description: Demographic description including age range, gender, location, etc.

size_estimate.description: Estimated size of this audience segment, e.g. 500万+, 10K-50K followers

interests.description: List of key interests or topics this audience engages with

platform.description: 该受众群体主要活跃的社交平台
